message:
feat: rollout container queries to remaining cards (Phase 3 of #8695) (#8789)

Convert viewport breakpoints (sm:, md:, lg:) to container query
breakpoints (@sm:, @md:, @lg:) in ~55 card files. Cards now respond
to their own container width rather than the viewport, fixing layout
issues when cards are in narrow columns or side panels.

Mapping: sm:grid-cols → @md:grid-cols (450px container),
md:grid-cols → @lg:grid-cols (600px container),
hidden sm:inline → hidden @sm:inline (300px container).

Modal files are excluded since they render outside the card container.

Fixes #8695

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
